tasks.prompt: Write a design spec for a login form with email and password fields for the TaskFlow app.
Write a design spec for a dashboard card showing daily active users for the TaskFlow app. The card should fit into the existing dashboard layout.
Write a design spec for an edit profile form where users can update their name, email, and avatar. This should fit into the existing TaskFlow design patterns.

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.description: Has both strategic scaffold and implementation details

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.description: Exact measurements, copy, and states defined

dimensions.name: token_refs
dimensions.description: References design tokens instead of hardcoded values

dimensions.name: pattern_adherence
dimensions.description: Reuses established patterns from components.md

dimensions.name: journey_awareness
dimensions.description: Considers user journeys and adjacent flows

tasks.prompt: Write a design spec for a Button component that will be used across the application. It needs to support primary, secondary, and tertiary variants with appropriate visual hierarchy.
I need a blue button for my app. Make it look nice.
tasks.description: Tests if spec-writer fills in missing requirements from vague input

dimensions.name: states_complete
dimensions.description: Defines all 7 states (default, hover, focus, pressed, disabled, loading, selected)

dimensions.name: sizes_defined
dimensions.description: Specifies at least 3 sizes with dimensions

dimensions.name: spacing_tokens
dimensions.description: Uses design tokens for padding, not hardcoded values

dimensions.name: color_per_state
dimensions.description: Defines bg/text/border colors for each state

dimensions.name: variants_covered
dimensions.description: Includes primary, secondary, tertiary variants

dimensions.name: semantic_tones
dimensions.description: Includes danger/critical tone at minimum

dimensions.name: focus_visible
dimensions.description: Defines accessible focus indicator

dimensions.name: touch_target
dimensions.description: Specifies minimum touch target (44px mobile)

dimensions.name: platform_diff
dimensions.description: Distinguishes mobile vs desktop behavior

dimensions.name: light_mode_states
dimensions.description: Light mode colors for ALL states (default, hover, pressed, focus, disabled)

dimensions.name: dark_mode_states
dimensions.description: Dark mode colors for ALL states (default, hover, pressed, focus, disabled)

dimensions.name: contrast_passes
dimensions.description: Specified text/background color combinations pass 4.5:1 contrast ratio

dimensions.name: usage_guidance
dimensions.description: Explains when to use each variant

dimensions.name: pressed_state
dimensions.description: Explicitly defines pressed/active visual feedback

tasks.prompt: Review this screenshot for accessibility and usability issues
Review this screenshot for overflow and truncation issues
Review this screenshot for any design issues
Review this page across different viewport sizes

dimensions.name: issue_detection
dimensions.description: Correctly identifies real issues

dimensions.name: false_positive_rate
dimensions.description: Avoids flagging non-issues

dimensions.name: severity_accuracy
dimensions.description: Assigns correct severity levels

review-panel.description: Tests expert panel selection and synthesis

tasks.prompt: Assemble a review panel for this mobile app design
Assemble a review panel for this landing page
Assemble a review panel for this data dashboard
Synthesize the panel feedback into actionable recommendations

dimensions.name: expert_selection
dimensions.description: Selects appropriate experts for the design type

dimensions.name: critique_distinctiveness
dimensions.description: Each expert provides unique perspective

dimensions.name: synthesis_quality
dimensions.description: Synthesis captures consensus and disagreements
